FOUNDATIONS
Welcome to the FOUNDATIONS module.
This is the building blocks of a successful Facebook ads campaign and below is a
breakdown of each training module here and what to expect including campaign setup,
pixels, reporting, creative and audiences.
Once you've implemented the training from below share your learnings and wins in the
group!
> The 4 Funnel System - How to create and structure an account to help you optimise your
results better. I've used this since 2014 to bring better structure, budget control ability and
analysis to my accounts, making it easier to profit and scale. It will differ based on niche and
objective and I focus mainly on Ecom and Lead Gen by way of examples.
Level: Basic / Intermediate
> Pixel Mastery - Key areas to focus on beyond just installing your pixel, such as additional
custom conversions/events and how to use the pixel data to support analysis and
optimisation
Level: Intermediate
> Data Setup - A couple of videos to get you started in setting up your data in the right way
to support analysis, decision making and optimisation including automating your reporting to
really take it to the next level
Level: Basic / Intermediate
> The 3N Ads Formula - One of my favourite sections on getting your ad to stick out,
engage and convert. I take you through some examples of ads that I've found or created to
illustrate tricks and tips to cut through the noise.
Level: Basic / Intermediate
> Audience & Funnel Cheatsheet - a breakdown of audiences to use and at what stage in
the funnel to use them, intended to be downloaded and referenced as and when you need it.
Level: Basic / Intermediate
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
